reasoning: This workout aims to improve lactate clearance and develop a better aerobic base by focusing on fatigue resistance, as highlighted by your power curve decline. Your last ride was a recovery-focused effort at 66% FTP, ensuring proper rest for today's training. Building fatigue resistance will help you sustain 220-235W on the Alpine Loop main climb, critical for success.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders in intervals: 4x12 min (4 min @ 218W, 4 min @ 245W, 4 min @ 256W) with 2 min easy spin between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
